title: VSee Health reports FY results
content:
* VSee Health press release [https://seekingalpha.com/pr/20459924-vsee-health-reports-2025-financial-results-revenue-grows-40-percent-year-over-year-with-a] (VSEE [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/VSEE]): FY
 	* Revenue of $14.62M (+40.3% Y/Y).
 	* Cash and cash equivalents increased to $5,266,286 at December 31, 2025, from $326,115 at December 31, 2024.
 	*
Gross margin rose 2% to $7,355,965 from $7,177,580

 	*
Operating expenses declined sharply by 76%
